string.name: whats_new_content
string.translation_description: HTML content listing new features in this release, shown in the What's new dialog and appended to the Help screen. Please do not change the < and > markup.

resources.string:
Celestial Images

Info cards now include photographs for all labelled objects — planets, stars, constellations, and Messier objects. Tap any object to explore it visually.

New Catalogue Objects

T Coronae Borealis (the "Blaze Star") and the Eta Carinae Nebula are now in the catalogue.

Night Mode

Red night mode now covers nearly all UI elements, including all dialogues and the compass calibration screen — no more blinding white flashes in the dark.
